settings.title: {{ product.title }}
settings.description: The Nuracom Stratos is the state of the art tech-dryer that redefines convenience with its industry-leading drying speed and efficiency.
settings.sub_feature_2: 3 times the industry standard for faster and more efficient drying.

settings.reviews_content: "I can't go back to a normal dryer or clothes line now... Its so good!"

settings.title: Transparent Prices & Great Quality
settings.subtitle: No middleman or markup fees, only fantastic materials.

settings.heading: A New Benchmark in Modern Design and Innovation.
settings.description: NuraCom is a modern electric laundry rack built for homes that want smarter drying, better hygiene, and a cleaner everyday routine. Designed to combine convenience with performance, it features telescopic poles to give you flexible hanging space without taking over the room. It’s made for households that want laundry to feel faster, easier, and more efficient.
settings.specs_content:
Model: Nuracom Stratos
Telescopic Pole Range: 130–220 cm
Main Host Size: 1200 × 330 × 80 mm
Lifting Height: 160–1200 mm
Load Capacity: 45kg (2x Scissor Arms)
Material: Top Grade Aluminium Alloy
Functions: Double lighting + Drying + Disinfection
Safety Features: Obstruction Sensor + Human Detection Switch with UV Sterilization Lamp
Motor: Ultra-silent motor
Control: Remote Control + One-touch Lifting
Smart Home App: Yes (Tuya App)
Voice Control Module: Yes (English voice control)
Ioniser Module: Yes (Negative ion)
Mite Removal: Yes
LED Light: Double lighting with 3 lighting modes
UV Power: 8W
Display Screen: Yes
Fan Count: 6
Logo Lamp: Glowing logo lamp
Power Plug: Australian flat 3 pin plug
Rated Power: 900W
Warranty: 5-year motor warranty, 2-year parts, 1-year unit warranty

settings.title: Voice Control
settings.description: Take convenience to the next level with intelligent voice control! With a quick voice command, you can operate the light, blower, heater, and other core features without lifting a finger.

settings.title: Remote Control
settings.description: Enjoy easy control from a distance with the included remote, offering reliable operation within a 30-metre range. Change settings effortlessly from wherever you’re most comfortable.

settings.title: Mobile App Control
settings.description: Manage your drying environment with ease by controlling the light, blower, and heater, while scheduling run times for greater energy efficiency. Wherever you are, your laundry system stays within reach.

settings.title: Designed for Aussie Homes
settings.description: Engineered for simple installation in Aussie homes, NuraCom is designed to be mounted to suitable ceiling trusses, creating a secure and practical setup. This allows for a more efficient installation process.

settings.heading: 4 Modes Of Control At Your Fingertips
settings.subtitle: NuraCom Stratos puts smart control at your fingertips, allowing you to manage key functions easily from the convenience of your smartphone.

settings.heading: A True Sense of Cleanliness
settings.description: Nuracom Stratos uses advanced UV light technology designed to support a cleaner, more hygienic drying experience. By helping reduce lingering bacteria on clothing during the drying process, it adds an extra layer of confidence to your everyday laundry routine. The result is clothing that feels fresher, cleaner, and well looked after.
settings.callout_text: To support safe everyday use, the system includes an inbuilt safety mechanism that automatically switches off the UV light when human presence is detected in the area.

settings.heading: Negative Ion Excellence!
settings.description:
NuraCom Strato's advanced ioniser targets stubborn odours at the source, from sweaty activewear to food smells, the ultrasonic wave technology works through fabrics to support a cleaner, fresher laundry result.

This also helps the issue of dust mites being a common issue in Aussie homes that contribute to everyday allergy and respiratory irritation. That is why Stratos adds an extra layer of care during the drying process, helping promote a more hygienic feel without relying on harsh chemicals. The result is clothes that smell and feel better.

settings.heading: Easy Lifting with One Touch
settings.subtitle: With Nuracom Stratos, drying clothes becomes a simpler, more seamless part of your everyday routine.
settings.r1_text: The Stratos is the most capable of the models, allowing easy install, quick drying, and guaranteed time savings.
settings.r2_text_1: Designed for smooth and effortless operation, Nuracom Stratos features a scissor-arm lifting frame that extends and retracts with ease, making it an ideal solution for busy households with frequent laundry loads.
settings.r2_text_2: With Nuracom Stratos, getting started is effortless. Once clothes are hung, a light upward push raises the rack and begins the drying process, creating a smoother and more intuitive laundry experience.

settings.heading: Economy++ Energy Savings
settings.description:
To support both safety and energy-conscious performance, Nuracom Stratos includes an automatic shut-off function that powers the system down after two hours of operation. It’s a smart feature designed to reduce unnecessary energy use while giving you added peace of mind.
This alone saves tons on your electricty bill!

settings.dark_description: Because comfort matters, Nuracom Stratos is designed to operate with minimal noise for a more peaceful home environment. Its upgraded DC motor is also engineered to reduce ongoing wear, helping deliver smoother operation and lasting reliability over time.
settings.light_description:
Enjoy greater control over your laundry space with two selectable lighting modes built into Nuracom Stratos. Whether you want a brighter setting for visibility or a softer ambience for everyday use, you can tailor the lighting to suit the moment.
It’s a practical feature that makes laundry more comfortable at any time of day, while also allowing the unit to function as a sleek and useful light source for the room.
